revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{神社 |名称= 御間都比古神社 |画像= |所在地= [[徳島県]][[名東郡]][[佐那河内村]]下モノミ石74-2 |祭神= 孝昭天皇|御…」
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 御間都比古神社 |画像= |所在地= [[徳島県]][[名東郡]][[佐那河内村]]下モノミ石74-2 |祭神= [[孝昭天皇|御間都比古色止命]] |社格= [[式内社]]・[[旧無格社]] |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= [[4月3日]] |神事= }} '''御間都比古神社'''（みまつひこじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[佐那河内村]]に鎮座する[[神社]]である。
== 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。祭神の御間都比古色止命とは[[孝昭天皇]]のことである。
御間都比古色止命は佐那河内の開拓神で、[[成務天皇]]の頃に[[韓背足尼]]が国造となり長峯の中腹（現在の下中峰）に奉祀したのが始まりとされる。[[醍醐天皇]]の時代に[[国幣小社]]に列せられた。
== 祭神 == * [[孝昭天皇|御間都比古色止命]]
== 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[徳島駅]]より車で約40分。
== 参考文献 == * 『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ 御間都比古神社 佐那河内村]
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みまつひこしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:佐那河内村の歴史]] [[Category:佐那河内村の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

== 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。祭神の御間都比古色止命は[[事代主神]]の子・[[天八現津彦命]]の御子神である。
御間都比古色止命は佐那河内の開拓神で、[[成務天皇]]の頃に9世孫の[[韓背足尼]]が[[長国造]]となり長峯の中腹（現在の下中峰）に奉祀したのが始まりとされる。[[醍醐天皇]]の時代に[[国幣小社]]に列せられた。
== 祭神 == * [[御間都比古色止命]]
== 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[徳島駅]]より車で約40分。
== 参考文献 == * 『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ 御間都比古神社 佐那河内村] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みまつひこしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:佐那河内村の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

revision.comment: /* 歴史 */修正
revision.text:
{{注意|このページの参考文献節は適正でない可能性があります。|date=2018年1月}}<!--[[利用者‐会話:Skate-song#要望と質問]]参照--> {{参照方法|date=2018年2月}} {{神社 |名称= 御間都比古神社 |画像= |所在地= [[徳島県]][[名東郡]][[佐那河内村]]下モノミ石74-2 |祭神= [[御間都比古色止命]] |社格= [[式内社]]・[[旧無格社]] |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= [[4月3日]] |神事= |緯度度 = 33 | 緯度分 = 59 | 緯度秒 = 40.5 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N |経度度 = 134 |経度分 = 28 | 経度秒 = 24 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E |地図国コード = JP |地図 = Japan Tokushima |ラベル位置 = left }} '''御間都比古神社'''（みまつひこじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[佐那河内村]]に鎮座する[[神社]]である。
== 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。祭神の御間都比古色止命は[[事代主神]]の子・[[天八現津彦命]]の御子神であるとされるが、同一神であるともされる<ref>[[中田憲信]]著「長公氏又都佐国造」『諸系譜』第六冊</ref>。
御間都比古色止命は佐那河内の開拓神で、[[成務天皇]]の頃に9世孫の[[韓背足尼]]が[[長国造]]となり長峯の中腹（現在の下中峰）に奉祀したのが始まりとされる。[[醍醐天皇]]の時代に[[国幣小社]]に列せられた。
== 祭神 == * [[御間都比古色止命]]
== 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[徳島駅]]より車で約40分。
== 参考文献 == * 『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ 御間都比古神社 佐那河内村] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みまつひこしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:佐那河内村の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

{{nihongo|'''Mimatsuhiko Shrine'''|御間都比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Mimatsuhiko Shrine'''|御間都比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Mimatsuhiko Shrine'''|御間都比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Mimatsuhiko Shrine'''|御間都比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Mimatsuhiko Shrine'''|御間都比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Mimatsuhiko Shrine'''|御間都比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{Infobox religious building | name = Mimatsuhiko Shrine | native_name = 御間都比古神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Mimatsuhiko Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|33.994883|134.473324}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Mimatsuhiko Shrine'''|御間都比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Mimatsuhiko Shrine'''|御間都比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{参照方法|date=2018年2月}} {{神社 |名称= 御間都比古神社 |画像= {{画像募集中|cat=名東郡}} |所在地= [[徳島県]][[名東郡]][[佐那河内村]]下モノミ石74-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= [[天八現津彦命|御間都比古色止命]] |社格= [[式内社]]・[[旧無格社]] |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= [[4月3日]] |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=御間都
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''御間都比古神社'''（みまつひこじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[佐那河内村]]に鎮座する[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。祭神の御間都比古色止命は佐那河内の開拓神で、[[成務天皇]]の頃に9世孫の[[韓背足尼]]が[[長国造]]となり長峯の中腹（現在の下中峰）に奉祀したのが始まりとされる。[[醍醐天皇]]の時代に[[国幣小社]]に列せられた。 == 祭神 == * [[天八現津彦命|御間都比古色止命]]（みまつひこいろとのみこと） == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[徳島駅]]より車で約40分。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603） == 外部リンク == * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ 御間都比古神社 佐那河内村] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みまつひこしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:佐那河内村の建築物]] [[Category:佐那河内村の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] ==End Japanese==

{{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= [[天八現津彦命|御間都比古色止命]] |社格= [[式内社]]・[[旧無格社]] |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= [[4月3日]] |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=御間都
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''御間都比古神社'''（みまつひこじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[佐那河内村]]に鎮座する[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。祭神の御間都比古色止命は佐那河内の開拓神で、[[成務天皇]]の頃に9世孫の[[韓背足尼]]が[[長国造]]となり長峯の中腹（現在の下中峰）に奉祀したのが始まりとされる。[[醍醐天皇]]の時代に[[国幣小社]]に列せられた。 == 祭神 == * [[天八現津彦命|御間都比古色止命]]（みまつひこいろとのみこと） == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[徳島駅]]より車で約40分。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 参考文献 == * 『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603） == 外部リンク == * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ 御間都比古神社 佐那河内村] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] ==End Japanese== [[Category:佐那河内村の建築物]] [[Category:佐那河内村の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

'ja'} [[JA:御間都比古神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48759389}} == Japanese content == {{参照方法|date=2018年2月}} {{神社 |名称= 御間都比古神社 |画像= {{画像募集中|cat=名東郡}} |所在地= {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|名東郡|Q1156486}}{{jalink|佐那河内村|Q1206355}}下モノミ石74-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|天八現津彦命|Q86728909|御間都比古色止命}} |社格= {{jalink|式内社}}・{{jalink|旧無格社}} |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{jalink|4月3日|Q2509}} |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=御間都
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''御間都比古神社'''（みまつひこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|佐那河内村|Q1206355}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 歴史 === 創建年は不詳。祭神の御間都比古色止命は佐那河内の開拓神で、{{jalink|成務天皇|Q316672}}の頃に9世孫の{{jalink|韓背足尼}}が{{jalink|長国造|Q21653903}}となり長峯の中腹（現在の下中峰）に奉祀したのが始まりとされる。{{jalink|醍醐天皇|Q329753}}の時代に{{jalink|延喜式神名帳#式内社の社格|Q11064932|国幣小社}}に列せられた。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|天八現津彦命|Q86728909|御間都比古色止命}}（みまつひこいろとのみこと） === 交通 === * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|徳島駅|Q860775}}より車で約40分。 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === 参考文献 === * 『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603） === 外部リンク === * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ 御間都比古神社 佐那河内村] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みまつひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:佐那河内村の建築物]] [[Category:佐那河内村の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''御間都比古神社'''（みまつひこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|佐那河内村|Q1206355}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 歴史 === 創建年は不詳。祭神の御間都比古色止命は佐那河内の開拓神で、{{jalink|成務天皇|Q316672}}の頃に9世孫の{{jalink|韓背足尼}}が{{jalink|長国造|Q21653903}}となり長峯の中腹（現在の下中峰）に奉祀したのが始まりとされる。{{jalink|醍醐天皇|Q329753}}の時代に{{jalink|延喜式神名帳#式内社の社格|Q11064932|国幣小社}}に列せられた。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|天八現津彦命|Q86728909|御間都比古色止命}}（みまつひこいろとのみこと） === 交通 === * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|徳島駅|Q860775}}より車で約40分。 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === 参考文献 === * 『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603） === 外部リンク === * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ 御間都比古神社 佐那河内村] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みまつひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:佐那河内村の建築物]] [[Category:佐那河内村の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''御間都比古神社'''（みまつひこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|佐那河内村|Q1206355}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 歴史 === 創建年は不詳。祭神の御間都比古色止命は佐那河内の開拓神で、{{jalink|成務天皇|Q316672}}の頃に9世孫の{{jalink|韓背足尼}}が{{jalink|長国造|Q21653903}}となり長峯の中腹（現在の下中峰）に奉祀したのが始まりとされる。{{jalink|醍醐天皇|Q329753}}の時代に{{jalink|延喜式神名帳#式内社の社格|Q11064932|国幣小社}}に列せられた。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|天八現津彦命|Q86728909|御間都比古色止命}}（みまつひこいろとのみこと） === 交通 === * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|徳島駅|Q860775}}より車で約40分。 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === 参考文献 === * 『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603） === 外部リンク === * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ 御間都比古神社 佐那河内村] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みまつひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:佐那河内村の建築物]] [[Category:佐那河内村の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Prefecture|Q160734}}{{jalink|Myōdō District|Q1156486}}{{jalink|Sanagōchi|Q1206355}} Shimo-Monomiishi 74-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|Ama-no-Yatsuhatsu-tsuhiko no Mikoto|Q86728909|Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto}} |社格= {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}・{{jalink|former unranked shrine}} |創建= unknown |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{jalink|April 3|Q2509}} |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=御間都
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Mimatsuhiko Shrine''' (みまつひこじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} enshrined in {{jalink|Sanagōchi|Q1206355}}, {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}. === History === The founding year is unknown. The enshrined Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto is a pioneering deity of Sanagōchi. It is said that in the era of {{jalink|Emperor Seimu|Q316672}}, the ninth-generation descendant {{jalink|Karasokeni}} became {{jalink|Naga no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Q21653903}} and originally enshrined this deity at the middle slope of Nagamine (present-day Shimo-Nakamine). In the era of {{jalink|Emperor Daigo|Q329753}}, it was listed as a {{jalink|small state-offered shrine|Q11064932|kokuhei shōsha}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Ama-no-Yatsuhatsu-tsuhiko no Mikoto|Q86728909|Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto}}（みまつひこいろとのみこと） === Access === * About 40 minutes by car from {{jalink|Tokushima Station|Q860775}} on {{jalink|JR Shikoku|Q496531|JR}}. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === References === * ''{{jalink|Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{jalink|1986|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603) === External links === * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ Mimatsuhiko Shrine, Sanagōchi Village] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みまつひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:佐那河内村の建築物]] [[Category:佐那河内村の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Mimatsuhiko Shrine''' (みまつひこじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} enshrined in {{jalink|Sanagōchi|Q1206355}}, {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}. === History === The founding year is unknown. The enshrined Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto is a pioneering deity of Sanagōchi. It is said that in the era of {{jalink|Emperor Seimu|Q316672}}, the ninth-generation descendant {{jalink|Karasokeni}} became {{jalink|Naga no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Q21653903}} and originally enshrined this deity at the middle slope of Nagamine (present-day Shimo-Nakamine). In the era of {{jalink|Emperor Daigo|Q329753}}, it was listed as a {{jalink|small state-offered shrine|Q11064932|kokuhei shōsha}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Ama-no-Yatsuhatsu-tsuhiko no Mikoto|Q86728909|Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto}}（みまつひこいろとのみこと） === Access === * About 40 minutes by car from {{jalink|Tokushima Station|Q860775}} on {{jalink|JR Shikoku|Q496531|JR}}. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === References === * ''{{jalink|Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{jalink|1986|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603) === External links === * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ Mimatsuhiko Shrine, Sanagōchi Village] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みまつひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:佐那河内村の建築物]] [[Category:佐那河内村の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

In the era of {{jalink|Emperor Daigo|Q329753}}, it was listed as a {{jalink|small state-offered shrine|Q11064932|kokuhei shōsha}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{jalink|Ama-no-Yatsuhatsu-tsuhiko no Mikoto|Q86728909|Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto}}（みまつひこいろとのみこと） === Access === * About 40 minutes by car from {{jalink|Tokushima Station|Q860775}} on {{jalink|JR Shikoku|Q496531|JR}}. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === References === * ''{{jalink|Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{jalink|1986|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603) === External links === * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ Mimatsuhiko Shrine, Sanagōchi Village] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みまつひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:佐那河内村の建築物]] [[Category:佐那河内村の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

The enshrined Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto is a pioneering deity of Sanagōchi. It is said that in the era of {{jalink|Emperor Seimu|Q316672}}, the ninth-generation descendant {{jalink|Karasokeni}} became {{jalink|Naga no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Q21653903}} and originally enshrined this deity at the middle slope of Nagamine (present-day Shimo-Nakamine). In the era of {{ill|lt=Emperor Daigo|Q329753|WD=Q329753}}, it was listed as a {{ill|lt=small state-offered shrine|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=kokuhei shōsha}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Ama-no-Yatsuhatsu-tsuhiko no Mikoto|Q86728909|WD=Q86728909|lt=Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto}}（みまつひこいろとのみこと） === Access === * About 40 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tokushima Station|Q860775|WD=Q860775}} on {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR}}. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603) === External links === * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ Mimatsuhiko Shrine, Sanagōchi Village] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みまつひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:佐那河内村の建築物]] [[Category:佐那河内村の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

The enshrined Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto is a pioneering deity of Sanagōchi. It is said that in the era of {{ill|lt=Emperor Seimu|Q316672|WD=Q316672}}, the ninth-generation descendant {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Karasokeni|1=UNKNOWN}} became {{ill|lt=Naga no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Q21653903|WD=Q21653903}} and originally enshrined this deity at the middle slope of Nagamine (present-day Shimo-Nakamine). In the era of {{ill|lt=Emperor Daigo|Q329753|WD=Q329753}}, it was listed as a {{ill|lt=small state-offered shrine|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=kokuhei shōsha}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Ama-no-Yatsuhatsu-tsuhiko no Mikoto|Q86728909|WD=Q86728909|lt=Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto}}（みまつひこいろとのみこと） === Access === * About 40 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tokushima Station|Q860775|WD=Q860775}} on {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR}}. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603) === External links === * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ Mimatsuhiko Shrine, Sanagōchi Village] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みまつひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:佐那河内村の建築物]] [[Category:佐那河内村の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

The enshrined Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto is a pioneering deity of Sanagōchi. It is said that in the era of {{ill|lt=Emperor Seimu|Q316672|WD=Q316672|1=Emperor Seimu}}, the ninth-generation descendant {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Karasokeni|1=UNKNOWN}} became {{ill|lt=Naga no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Q21653903|WD=Q21653903|1=Naga no Kuni no Miyatsuko}} and originally enshrined this deity at the middle slope of Nagamine (present-day Shimo-Nakamine). In the era of {{ill|lt=Emperor Daigo|Q329753|WD=Q329753|1=Emperor Daigo}}, it was listed as a {{ill|lt=small state-offered shrine|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=kokuhei shōsha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Ama-no-Yatsuhatsu-tsuhiko no Mikoto|Q86728909|WD=Q86728909|lt=Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto|1=Mimatsuhiko-Irodo-no-Mikoto}}（みまつひこいろとのみこと） === Access === * About 40 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tokushima Station|Q860775|WD=Q860775|1=Tokushima Station}} on {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}} ISBN 4040013603) === External links === * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ Mimatsuhiko Shrine, Sanagōchi Village] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みまつひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:佐那河内村の建築物]] [[Category:佐那河内村の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]][[Category:qq]]

3|Q2509|WD=Q2509|1=April 3}} |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=御間都
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Mimatsuhiko Shrine''' (みまつひこじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Sanagōchi|Q1206355|WD=Q1206355|1=Sanagōchi, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === History === The founding year is unknown. The enshrined Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto is a pioneering deity of Sanagōchi. It is said that in the era of {{ill|lt=Emperor Seimu|Q316672|WD=Q316672|1=Emperor Seimu}}, the ninth-generation descendant {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Karasokeni|1=UNKNOWN}} became {{ill|lt=Naga no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Q21653903|WD=Q21653903|1=Naga no Kuni no Miyatsuko}} and originally enshrined this deity at the middle slope of Nagamine (present-day Shimo-Nakamine). In the era of {{ill|lt=Emperor Daigo|Q329753|WD=Q329753|1=Emperor Daigo}}, it was listed as a {{ill|lt=small state-offered shrine|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=kokuhei shōsha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Ama-no-Yatsuhatsu-tsuhiko no Mikoto|Q86728909|WD=Q86728909|lt=Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto|1=Mimatsuhiko-Irodo-no-Mikoto}}（みまつひこいろとのみこと） === Access === * About 40 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tokushima Station|Q860775|WD=Q860775|1=Tokushima Station}} on {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}} ISBN 4040013603) === External links === * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ Mimatsuhiko Shrine, Sanagōchi Village] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:佐那河内村の建築物]] [[Category:佐那河内村の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]][[Category:qq]]

It is said that in the era of {{ill|lt=Emperor Seimu|Q316672|WD=Q316672|1=Emperor Seimu}}, the ninth-generation descendant {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Karasokeni|1=UNKNOWN}} became {{ill|lt=Naga no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Q21653903|WD=Q21653903|1=Naga no Kuni no Miyatsuko}} and originally enshrined this deity at the middle slope of Nagamine (present-day Shimo-Nakamine). In the era of {{ill|lt=Emperor Daigo|Q329753|WD=Q329753|1=Emperor Daigo}}, it was listed as a {{ill|lt=small state-offered shrine|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=kokuhei shōsha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Ama-no-Yatsuhatsu-tsuhiko no Mikoto|Q86728909|WD=Q86728909|lt=Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto|1=Mimatsuhiko-Irodo-no-Mikoto}}（みまつひこいろとのみこと） === Access === * About 40 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tokushima Station|Q860775|WD=Q860775|1=Tokushima Station}} on {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}} ISBN 4040013603) === External links === * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ Mimatsuhiko Shrine, Sanagōchi Village] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:佐那河内村の建築物]] [[Category:佐那河内村の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]]

The enshrined Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto is a pioneering deity of Sanagōchi. It is said that in the era of {{ill|lt=Emperor Seimu|Q316672|WD=Q316672|1=Emperor Seimu}}, the ninth-generation descendant {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Karasokeni|1=UNKNOWN}} became {{ill|lt=Naga no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Q21653903|WD=Q21653903|1=Naga no Kuni no Miyatsuko}} and originally enshrined this deity at the middle slope of Nagamine (present-day Shimo-Nakamine). In the era of {{ill|lt=Emperor Daigo|Q329753|WD=Q329753|1=Emperor Daigo}}, it was listed as a {{ill|lt=small state-offered shrine|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|lt=kokuhei shōsha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Ama-no-Yatsuhatsu-tsuhiko no Mikoto|Q86728909|WD=Q86728909|lt=Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto|1=Mimatsuhiko-Irodo-no-Mikoto}}（みまつひこいろとのみこと） === Access === * About 40 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tokushima Station|Q860775|WD=Q860775|1=Tokushima Station}} on {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}} ISBN 4040013603) === External links === * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ Mimatsuhiko Shrine, Sanagōchi Village] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Sanagochi]] [[Category:History of Sanagochi]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]]

District|Q1156486|qid=Q1156486|1=Myōdō District, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Sanagōchi|Q1206355|qid=Q1206355|1=Sanagōchi, Tokushima}} Shimo-Monomiishi 74-2 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|lt=Ama-no-Yatsuhatsu-tsuhiko no Mikoto|Q86728909|qid=Q86728909|lt=Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto|1=Mimatsuhiko-Irodo-no-Mikoto}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}・{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former unranked shrine|1=Unranked shrines|qid=Q134917285}} |創建= unknown |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{ill|lt=April 3|Q2509|qid=Q2509|1=April 3}} |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=御間都
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Mimatsuhiko Shrine''' (みまつひこじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Sanagōchi|Q1206355|qid=Q1206355|1=Sanagōchi, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === History === The founding year is unknown. The enshrined Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto is a pioneering deity of Sanagōchi. It is said that in the era of {{ill|lt=Emperor Seimu|Q316672|qid=Q316672|1=Emperor Seimu}}, the ninth-generation descendant {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Karasokeni|1=UNKNOWN}} became {{ill|lt=Naga no Kuni no Miyatsuko|Q21653903|qid=Q21653903|1=Naga no Kuni no Miyatsuko}} and originally enshrined this deity at the middle slope of Nagamine (present-day Shimo-Nakamine). In the era of {{ill|lt=Emperor Daigo|Q329753|qid=Q329753|1=Emperor Daigo}}, it was listed as a {{ill|lt=small state-offered shrine|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=kokuhei shōsha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Ama-no-Yatsuhatsu-tsuhiko no Mikoto|Q86728909|qid=Q86728909|lt=Mimatsuhiko Iroto no Mikoto|1=Mimatsuhiko-Irodo-no-Mikoto}}（みまつひこいろとのみこと） === Access === * About 40 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tokushima Station|Q860775|qid=Q860775|1=Tokushima Station}} on {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|qid=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|qid=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|qid=Q2430|1=1986}} ISBN 4040013603) === External links === * [http://www.vill.sanagochi.lg.jp/docs/2012120400231/ Mimatsuhiko Shrine, Sanagōchi Village] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Mimatsuhiko Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Sanagochi]] [[Category:History of Sanagochi]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]]
